title: Waiting out the moon
note: Best Milky Way views start a couple hours after moonset — the same patience it takes for a noisy dataset to reveal its real signal.

title: A season's worth of clouds
note: Three clear nights all month. The pattern wasn't in the sky, it was in setting up the tripod anyway — the same instinct that keeps a stalled design moving.

title: Same shape, different scale
note: The branching in a lightning bolt, a river delta, and a fern frond are all the same growth rule playing out at different sizes. I notice this more than I probably should.
